description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:7.6.4-jdk17 Docker image. Set the GRADLE_OPTS variable to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false and add a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME to the .gradle directory in the workspace. Define a cache for .gradle/, build/ and any */build/ directories. Add a build stage with a build job that runs gradle --build-cache --full-stacktrace discord:shadowJar and publishes discord/build/libs/alexis-discord.jar as an artifact. Add a test stage with a test job that runs gradle --build-cache --full-stacktrace check, then gradle jacocoReport, and finally cats the JaCoCo HTML index file.
